name: Spritz
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 25 Minutes Bake Time: 5 to 7 Minutes
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. In a large bowl, cream the Butter Flavor Crisco and sugar using an electric mixer on medium speed until well combined.
3. Beat in the egg, salt, vanilla, and almond extract. Mix in the flour until just incorporated.
4. Use a cookie press to form dough into desired shapes, spacing them about 2 inches apart on a cooling, ungreased baking sheet.
5. Bake for 5 to 7 minutes at 400°F (200°C) or until set but not brown. Allow cookies to cool for one minute before transferring them to a wire rack.
4 to 4 and a half dozen cookies.
NOTE: The dough can be tinted with a few drops of food coloring if desired. Cookies can also be iced and decorated as preferred.
